evidence.claim: Used Flask, Redux, LoRA, Computer Vision, Speech Recognition, Image Classification, Recommendation Systems, Sentence Transformers, LangChain, TensorFlow, Hugging Face Transformers, MLOps, Forecasting, Python, Object Detection, Weaviate, Learning to Rank
evidence.source_text: Skills: Flask, Redux, LoRA, Computer Vision, Speech Recognition, Image Classification, Recommendation Systems, Sentence Transformers, LangChain, TensorFlow, Hugging Face Transformers, MLOps, Forecasting, Python, Object Detection, Weaviate, Learning to Rank

evidence.claim: Used sentence-transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2, bge-base) with FAISS for semantic search
evidence.source_text: Used sentence-transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2 initially, later upgraded to bge-base) with FAISS for fast nearest-neighbor retrieval.

evidence.claim: Built RAG-based chatbot using OpenAI embeddings, Pinecone, and GPT-4/fine-tuned models
evidence.source_text: Built the document ingestion pipeline (chunking, embedding via OpenAI embeddings, storing in Pinecone) and the answer-generation layer (initially GPT-4, then a fine-tuned smaller model for cost control).

evidence.claim: Improved search-relevance by 35% over Elasticsearch BM25
evidence.source_text: Reported search-relevance improvement of 35% over the prior Elasticsearch BM25 setup, validated through human relevance judgments.

evidence.claim: Reduced average ticket resolution time by 31%
evidence.source_text: Deployment cut average ticket resolution time by 31% for the supported categories.

evidence.claim: Led team migrating keyword-search-based product to embedding-based retrieval
evidence.source_text: Recently, I led the team that migrated our keyword-search-based product to embedding-based retrieval.

evidence.claim: Earned AWS Certified Machine Learning Specialty
evidence.source_text: Certifications: AWS Certified Machine Learning Specialty (AWS, 2020)

evidence.claim: Prioritizes learning through shipping real systems in production
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Comfortable with operational ML tasks including A/B testing, drift monitoring, and retraining schedules
evidence.source_text: Along the way I've gotten comfortable with the operational side — A/B testing, drift monitoring, retraining schedules.
